name: chat_with_context
description: Send a message through BlackBox chat with full context retrieval. Returns AI response enriched with relevant snapshots.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

model.description: Model name (optional - uses default for provider)

returns: Returns AI response enriched with relevant snapshots
